name: Karen's Zucchini Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 Egg Beaters® 99% Egg Substitute, Or Equivalent
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the zucchini and remove the seeds. Then, shred the zucchini.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and cinnamon) and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg beaters until foamy. Gradually add sugar, applesauce, vanilla extract, and shredded zucchini to the eggs. Beat until smooth.
4. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir in the raisins.
5. Pour the batter into two greased and floured loaf pans (8-1/2 inches x 4-1/4 inches).
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour.
One serving equals one slice.
